title: Analytics - Settings Changed
scenario: Log a "setting_changed" Firebase event when a setting is changed in the app or synced to the device, tracking Device PID, Global Setting ID, and Settings Value.
steps: Change a setting in the app
Check Firebase Analytics dashboard for 'setting_changed' event
Verify default dashboard elements: Graph for this event, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment
Verify tracked parameters: Device PID, Global Setting ID, Settings Value
expected: The 'setting_changed' event is logged to Firebase Analytics when a setting is changed in the app or synced to the device. The dashboard displays the default elements (Graph, Events in last 30 minutes, Event count by Country, Event count by Gender, Events per session, App Version, App build, App Environment) and includes the tracked parameters (Device PID, Global Setting ID, Settings Value).
